text:
Ye (Wendy) Jin
Ye (Wendy) Jin is an Assistant Professor of Economics at NYU Shanghai and a Global Network Assistant Professor at the Leonard N. Stern School of Business at NYU. She holds a PhD in Economics from University of California and a BA and a MA from Tsinghua University.Professor Jin’s research interests are Game Theory, Behavioral Economics, and Experimental Economics. Her work has appeared in Journal of Comparative Economics.
